title: util-linux security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2.32.1-48.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-48]
- fix RHEL-134296 - libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()
- fix RHEL-133946 - login-utils: fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]
full_text:
[2.32.1-48.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-48]
- fix RHEL-134296 - libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()
- fix RHEL-133946 - login-utils: fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1852.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-14104.html
